rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Gov't Code §418.073, which governs the disaster contingency fund. The statutes address entirely separate subjects with no overlapping operative provisions.
quote: Sec. 418.073. DISASTER CONTINGENCY FUND. (a) The disaster contingency fund consists of money appropriated to the fund.
_note: No conflict; rule_text pertains to disaster contingency fund administration, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
